overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City's dense urban center. The player character navigates covered pedestrian walkways, crosses futuristic streets with automated traffic, and passes beneath massive elevated highway structures surrounded by holographic advertisements and shifting neon lighting. The atmosphere features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with overcast skies, artificial neon illumination, and towering futuristic architecture.

entering covered pedestrian walkway from open street intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a building overhang at a street corner, crossing a yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk with a green traffic light. The camera enters a covered commercial walkway with the 'CITY CENTER' sign visible ahead, passing futuristic vehicles waiting at the intersection and various pedestrians walking along the tiled pavement.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian corridor, observing the digital billboards and shop fronts on either side

elevated pedestrian bridge or monorail track running above the street with yellow accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered pedestrian street beneath the 'CITY CENTER' signage, surrounded by digital billboards and commercial storefronts. The walkway is populated with pedestrians moving in the same direction, and an elevated transport structure runs overhead with distinctive yellow lighting accents.

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into brighter, naturally lit open area under the overpass
approaching large intersection with massive holographic billboard becoming prominent on left

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area beneath the massive elevated highway structure, approaching a large intersection with visible traffic

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving along the street parallel to the pedestrian walkway

entered.detail: massive holographic advertisement showing a woman's face with blue-tinted hair covering the side of a building
large multi-story building with red facade and grid-patterned windows
curved on-ramp structure connecting to the main elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide-open intersection beneath massive elevated highway infrastructure. A prominent holographic billboard of a woman's face dominates the left side of the view, while a distinctive red office building stands on the right. The lighting shifts to natural diffused daylight as the camera moves through this transitional urban space with moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath elevated highway with traffic intersection

waiting for white sports car to pass before continuing across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking beneath the massive overpass structure, navigating around other pedestrians and waiting for traffic

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sports car driving through the intersection
pedestrian in red shirt walking toward the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall black traffic light pole with multiple signal lights and digital displays
sleek white futuristic vehicle with illuminated accents driving through the intersection
building facade with bright green illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Turning left beneath the massive elevated highway underpass, the scene becomes darker with low lighting conditions. The camera navigates a crosswalk intersection where a white sports car passes by, while the distinctive red building shifts to the left side of the frame. Green neon-lit windows become visible in the distance, signaling the transition to a more artificially lit corridor ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit covered corridor with color-changing ambient lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from green neon to vibrant pink and purple neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the cyberpunk-style neon corridor, passing by illuminated shop fronts and palm tree planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction through the neon-lit corridor

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign with 'ASUKA' text and geometric patterns above shop entrance
large concrete planters with palm trees lining the pedestrian walkway
row of commercial establishments with vibrant pink and blue neon lighting and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a heavily stylized cyberpunk corridor with dramatic neon lighting. Initially illuminated by green-tinted windows on the left, the ambient lighting shifts to vibrant pink and purple as the 'ASUKA' neon sign becomes prominent. Palm tree planters line the walkway, and the covered corridor features continuous digital advertising screens and glowing shop fronts, creating an immersive neon-drenched atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open street corner into the dense, neon-lit interior of a commercial pedestrian hub. It begins under a building overhang, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a green traffic light while passing futuristic vehicles idling at the intersection. As the camera moves forward, the open street transitions into a covered walkway, passing under a prominent City Center sign and along tiled pavements crowded with pedestrians. The scene then expands into a corridor of digital billboards and commercial storefronts, where the environment becomes more enclosed and artificial. Finally, the perspective continues deep into the pedestrian street, moving beneath an elevated transport structure accented by distinctive yellow lighting.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban intersection into a dark, neon-drenched cyberpunk corridor. It begins by emerging from a covered walkway into a wide intersection beneath massive elevated highway infrastructure, where a holographic billboard of a woman's face and a red office building frame the view under diffused daylight. As the camera turns left beneath the highway underpass, the lighting dims significantly, passing a white sports car at a crosswalk while green neon-lit windows appear in the distance. The scene then shifts into a heavily stylized corridor where the ambient light transforms from green to vibrant pink and purple hues. Finally, the camera glides past palm tree planters and glowing shop fronts beneath a prominent ASUKA neon sign and continuous digital advertising screens.
